title: Games | Daniel Short
description: Browser games and simulations by Daniel Short focused on systems, probability, progression, and feedback loops.
ogDescription: Browser games and simulations by Daniel Short focused on systems, probability, progression, and feedback loops.
heroLead: Interactive experiments in state, balance, probability, progression, and feedback loops. Each one is playable in the browser.

games.title: Stellar Dogfight
games.summary: Pilot a nimble fighter, duel adaptive AI opponents, and tune upgrades across repeated combat loops.

games.title: Double-Zero Roulette
games.summary: Run a double-zero table, inspect bet layouts, and track recent-spin distributions over time.

games.title: Probability Engine
games.summary: Construct slot reels, chain synergies, automate a casino floor, and test long-run probability systems.

games.title: Project Starfall
games.summary: Choose a class, fight through side-scrolling maps, collect gear, and test RPG progression systems.

games.title: Ocean Wave Simulation
games.summary: Adjust wave, light, and wind parameters in a real-time canvas simulation sandbox.
